comment.body: Unlikely... But that is where there are higher stacks of puts next week and puts have mostly been sold. GS currently trading at 16.1-16.2x NTM PE, last time seen in 2008-2009. 14x is likely where it wants to be which is a $90 decline from here which is $628, so $630 does make sense. We saw Visa drop from $375 to $335 in 6 trading days (10.6% decline). A 10% decline for GS takes to about $647 which fills all its recent gaps so I would say $650 could be more reasonable target
